login.heading: Welcome.
login.subtitle: Sign in with your phone number or username
login.invalidCredentials: Incorrect phone number or password. Please try again.
login.serverError: The server had a problem, please try again shortly.
login.connectionError: Could not connect. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters

forgotPassword.heroSubtitle: Your account is managed by SEKAR admin. Contact admin to request a new password.
forgotPassword.noteText: After your password is reset, the admin will send a temporary password via WhatsApp. On first login, you must create a new password.
